title: Separate canonical Harness IR and Builder Workflow IR
bounded_ST_03_03_interpretation: HarnessIR owns product-semantic governed values and contains no worker queue retry sandbox deployment or WorkflowIR state. Workflow identity is absent from this synthetic compile and cannot rewrite HarnessIR.
acceptance_evidence: architecture and forbidden-field tests; typed root contract

title: Canonical source of truth
bounded_ST_03_03_interpretation: The immutable HarnessIR snapshot is the only authoritative product-semantic aggregate. This Story emits no independent human or machine artifact copy.
acceptance_evidence: single-snapshot repository test; local semantic-copy rejection

title: Maintain one canonical typed Harness IR
bounded_ST_03_03_interpretation: The initial typed IR contains identity evidence syntax Activative semantics phases contexts contracts modules skills references evaluators repairs budgets implementation units and authorization sections. Unresolved sections retain governed hypothesis or not-applicable status.

title: Attach provenance and authority metadata to material values
bounded_ST_03_03_interpretation: Every material leaf records knowledge status authority evidence refs decision ref where applicable confidence/disposition creator/version and dependency impact; missing required provenance fails.
acceptance_evidence: governed-value property tests; missing-provenance negative test

title: Version IR schemas and migrations
bounded_ST_03_03_interpretation: The root declares schema ID/version/revision and an explicit compatibility policy. Version 1.0.0 is the sole readable/writeable version; unsupported versions block because no prior-version migration is authorized.

title: Schema evolution
bounded_ST_03_03_interpretation: Version and compatibility behavior are machine-checkable and no in-place schema mutation is allowed.
acceptance_evidence: version registry and immutable snapshot tests

title: Artifact deprecation
bounded_ST_03_03_interpretation: The IR compatibility policy carries typed deprecation entries with replacement guidance affected consumers removal gates and regression evidence; the initial version has an explicit empty deprecation set.

title: End-to-end provenance
bounded_ST_03_03_interpretation: The IR root and every material value trace to exact Source Lock boundary model ratification constitution and decision references without flattening Activative lineage into notes.
